About

Web developer with a strong technical foundation and a growing interest in data analytics. Passionate about using data to uncover insights, drive decisions, and complement my development background with analytical skills.

Experience

  • 2023 - Present

    Lead Developer @ Compensation Negotiator

    Boca Raton, FL

    Summary:

    • Designed and optimized data-driven web applications that streamlined real estate compensation workflows. Focused on automation, database efficiency, and user-centric solutions that improved agent productivity and reduced paperwork.

    Responsibilities:

    • Designed and implemented automated workflows that reduced manual paperwork and improved completion rates of agent compensation agreements.
    • Built scalable MySQL-backed systems to manage agent data, ensuring high data integrity and consistency.
    • Developed enterprise and free product tiers, enabling brokerages to manage large data volumes and track KPIs centrally.
    • Partnered with stakeholders to identify process bottlenecks and deliver solutions that increased agent efficiency and reduced turnaround times.

  • 2022 - Present

    Web Developer @ The Signature Real Estate Companies

    Boca Raton, FL

    Summary:

    • Managed and improved a portfolio of 31+ websites, collaborating with stakeholders to deliver data-backed features and insights. Contributed to building proprietary databases and tools that enhanced lead generation, property discovery, and business decision-making.

    Responsibilities:

    • Analyzed and maintained performance metrics across a portfolio of 31 websites, improving site reliability and security.
    • Collaborated with product managers to design features that enhanced lead generation, contributing to a measurable increase in user engagement.
    • Contributed to the development of an internal property database by aggregating and cleaning proprietary datasets, providing analysts and executives with a competitive market advantage.
    • Created reusable reporting and UI components to streamline search workflows, boosting property discovery and conversion rates.

Projects

Runnr

Lightweight run tracking app. Import workouts & get insights/analytics into your training.

  • Developed using React & Firebase, allowing users to sign in with Google and import workouts from Apple Health or Garmin Connect.
  • Includes a demo mode for users to test/view the app without signing in.
Compensation Negotiator

A web application that automates real estate compensation workflows.

  • Built with Laravel, Livewire, Tailwind CSS, and MySQL.
  • Implemented real-time chat & automated PDF generation and data processes to improve efficiency.
VAV Customs

A custom ecommerce store built with React and Shopify for payment processing.

  • Product management and shopping cart functionality built with React & Shopify.
  • Secure payment integration through Shopify.
Real Estate Market Analysis

Analyzing housing market trends and building dashboards for clear visualization.

  • Built Python-based exploratory analysis and feature engineering on King County housing sales data.
  • Developed interactive Excel dashboards with PivotTables and charts to visualize pricing trends and regional patterns.
